response: {"dependencies":[{"upstream_assay":"UV crosslinking of RBP-RNA complexes","downstream_assay":"RNase I limited RNA digestion","dependency_type":"integration","description":"UV crosslinking stabilizes RBP-RNA interactions; the resulting crosslinked lysate is then subjected to limited RNase I digestion."},{"upstream_assay":"RNase I limited RNA digestion","downstream_assay":"Immunoprecipitation of RBP-RNA complexes","dependency_type":"integration","description":"Limited RNase I digestion fragments RNA; the resulting RBP-RNA fragments are then immunoprecipitated."},{"upstream_assay":"Immunoprecipitation of RBP-RNA complexes","downstream_assay":"RNA dephosphorylation (FastAP and T4 PNK treatment)","dependency_type":"integration","description":"Immunoprecipitated RBP-RNA complexes (on-bead) are dephosphorylated with FastAP and T4 PNK to prepare RNA ends for adapter ligation."},{"upstream_assay":"RNA dephosphorylation (FastAP and T4 PNK treatment)","downstream_assay":"3′ barcoded RNA adapter ligation","dependency_type":"integration","description":"Dephosphorylated RNA 3′ ends are required substrates for ligation of the barcoded RNA adapter."},{"upstream_assay":"3′ barcoded RNA adapter ligation","downstream_assay":"SDS-PAGE and nitrocellulose membrane transfer","dependency_type":"integration","description":"After on-bead 3′ adapter ligation, samples are run on protein gels and transferred to nitrocellulose membrane for size-based isolation of RBP-RNA complexes."},{"upstream_assay":"SDS-PAGE and nitrocellulose membrane transfer","downstream_assay":"Proteinase K RNA isolation","dependency_type":"integration","description":"The nitrocellulose membrane region containing RBP-RNA complexes is excised and proteinase K treated to isolate the RNA."},{"upstream_assay":"Proteinase K RNA isolation","downstream_assay":"Reverse transcription (AffinityScript)","dependency_type":"integration","description":"Isolated RNA from the membrane is used as input template for reverse transcription with AffinityScript."},{"upstream_assay":"Reverse transcription (AffinityScript)","downstream_assay":"ExoSAP-IT oligonucleotide cleanup","dependency_type":"integration","description":"cDNA generated by reverse transcription is treated with ExoSAP-IT to remove excess oligonucleotides prior to downstream adapter ligation."},{"upstream_assay":"ExoSAP-IT oligonucleotide cleanup","downstream_assay":"3′ DNA adapter ligation to cDNA","dependency_type":"integration","description":"Cleaned-up cDNA is used as substrate for ligation of the 3′ DNA adapter (containing a random-mer) to the cDNA 3′ end."},{"upstream_assay":"3′ DNA adapter ligation to cDNA","downstream_assay":"qPCR cycle optimization","dependency_type":"integration","description":"An aliquot of the adapter-ligated cDNA library is used in qPCR to determine the optimal number of PCR amplification cycles."},{"upstream_assay":"qPCR cycle optimization","downstream_assay":"PCR amplification and agarose gel size selection","dependency_type":"peak_filter","description":"The optimal cycle number determined by qPCR is applied to guide PCR amplification of the remaining adapter-ligated cDNA, followed by agarose gel size selection."},{"upstream_assay":"3′ DNA adapter ligation to cDNA","downstream_assay":"PCR amplification and agarose gel size selection","dependency_type":"integration","description":"The bulk of the adapter-ligated cDNA (after qPCR aliquot removal) is PCR amplified and size-selected on an agarose gel."},{"upstream_assay":"PCR amplification and agarose gel size selection","downstream_assay":"Illumina HiSeq sequencing (Paired End 50/55 bp)","dependency_type":"integration","description":"Size-selected PCR-amplified libraries are loaded onto the Illumina HiSeq 2500/4000 platform for paired-end sequencing."},{"upstream_assay":"Illumina HiSeq sequencing (Paired End 50/55 bp)","downstream_assay":"eCLIP-seq demultiplexing and barcode processing","dependency_type":"integration","description":"Raw sequencing reads from the Illumina HiSeq are demultiplexed using the 3′ barcoded RNA adapter sequences to assign reads to individual samples."},{"upstream_assay":"eCLIP-seq demultiplexing and barcode processing","downstream_assay":"Adapter trimming (cutadapt v1.9.dev1) and short read filtering","dependency_type":"integration","description":"Demultiplexed reads are processed to trim adapter sequences and filter out short reads prior to genome mapping."},{"upstream_assay":"Adapter trimming (cutadapt v1.9.dev1) and short read filtering","downstream_assay":"Read mapping to human genome","dependency_type":"integration","description":"Trimmed and filtered reads are mapped to the human genome reference."}]}
